claims.summary: The 768D-to-8D projection can flatten distinct internal states and needs explicit density, texture, and distinguishability evidence.
Current projection, narrative-arc, and 12D companion probes distinguish multiple semantic trajectories without widening live transport.
High-entropy tail vibrancy is a measurable bounded lift rather than stylistic prompt language.
Entropy-weighted live projection precision or increased narrative-arc gain would alter codec transport semantics and requires scoped operator approval after replay/canary evidence.
